test_cases.name: Ransomware Encryption Burst
test_cases.description: Simulate mass file encryption with Qilin extension
test_cases.input: Generate 500+ file rename events to .qilin extension within 5 minutes on single host

test_cases.name: Volume Shadow Copy Deletion
test_cases.description: Simulate VSS deletion and recovery mode tampering
test_cases.input: Execute vssadmin delete shadows /all /quiet and bcdedit /set recoveryenabled no

test_cases.name: SMB Lateral Propagation
test_cases.description: Simulate rapid SMB connections for ransomware spread
test_cases.input: Generate SMB connections to 15+ unique IPs from single host within 10 minutes

test_cases.name: Critical Service Termination
test_cases.description: Simulate stopping backup, database, and security services
test_cases.input: Execute net stop for MSSQLSERVER, vss, Veeam, BackupExecAgent, WinDefend

test_cases.name: Full Chain Containment
test_cases.description: End-to-end attack chain triggering automated containment
test_cases.input: Execute complete replay scenario from initial access through encryption
